name: paint my world
overview: BRODASHAGGI A young man named PETERSON (BRODASHAGGI) was born a half yoruba/igbo went to the eastern part of Nigeria to reserch about a native community called Umuanyasi Village only to find out that it was a journey untold…He found love among three girl friends from the village

trailers.title: PAINT MY WORLD PART1 - BRODASHAGGI & DESTINY ETICO 2020 LATEST NIGERIAN NOLLYWOOD MOVIES FULL HD
